title: horkelia bolanderi subsp. parryi
intro: Horkelia bolanderi subsp. parryi, also known as Bolander's horkelia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family and is native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Bolander's horkelia include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Horkelia bolanderi subsp. parryi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
